For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – April 8, 2026 – Zacks Equity Research shares Samsara IOT as the Bull of the Day and RH RH as the Bear of the Day. In addition, Zacks Equity Research provides analysis on Intel Corp. INTC, Micron Technology, Inc. MU and Broadcom Inc. AVGO .

Here is a synopsis of all five stocks:

Bull of the Day:

Samsara , a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), operates a cloud-based IoT platform that connects vehicles, equipment, and facilities through sensors, helping businesses track, monitor, and optimize their physical operations in real time.

The stock has pulled back with the market after a solid earnings beat that helped the stock erase 2026 losses. After some consolidation, current levels are giving investors a nice opportunity to enter one of the most compelling long-term growth stories in the industrial technology space.

About the Company

Samsara serves a wide range of asset-intensive industries including logistics, construction, utilities, and field services. Its platform addresses critical operational needs across fleet tracking, driver safety, asset monitoring, regulatory compliance, and operations analytics.

What makes Samsara's model attractive is its high recurring revenue base and strong revenue visibility. Once embedded in a customer's operations, the platform becomes deeply mission-critical, driving low churn and expanding wallet share over time. The company now serves customers across multiple verticals with a growing suite of connected products, and multi-product adoption is accelerating.

IOT is valued at $19 billion and has a Forward PE of 47. The stock has Zacks Style Scores of "F" in Value, but "A" in Growth.

Q4 Earnings Beat

Samsara delivered a strong fourth-quarter beat, coming in 38% above EPS expectations. Revenue reached $444 million versus the $422 million consensus, representing continued momentum in a challenging macro environment for industrial spending.

Annual Recurring Revenue hit $1.89 billion, up 30% year-over-year, with $432 million in net new ARR added in the quarter. Notably, this marks three consecutive quarters of accelerating net new ARR growth.

Guidance was constructive across the board. For Q1, the company sees revenue of $454–456 million versus the $445 million consensus, implying 24% year-over-year growth. The bigger story was the full-year fiscal 2027 outlook: revenue guidance of $1.97 billion topped the $1.91 billion consensus, with EPS guided to $0.65–0.69 versus the $0.57 expected.

Management also outlined a path to 19% operating margins. This is a signal that this is no longer just a growth story, but an increasingly profitable and scalable one.

Analyst estimates have been moving steadily higher in the wake of earnings. For the current year, estimates have risen from $0.57 to $0.68 over the past 30 days. Next year's estimates have moved from $0.71 to $0.84 over the same period, an 18% increase.

On the analyst front, the institutional community remains broadly bullish. Wells Fargo, Piper Sandler, and Keybanc all reiterate Overweight ratings with price targets ranging from $39 to $46. Goldman Sachs reiterates a Buy and raised its target to $41 from $36.

The AI and Data Moat

One of the most underappreciated elements of the Samsara story is the scale of its data infrastructure. The platform now processes 25 trillion data points annually, which is a figure that creates a compounding competitive advantage as the company deploys AI across its product suite.

AI is becoming central to the platform narrative. Products like Safety Coach use this data to deliver real-time driver coaching and risk scoring, and management has outlined a roadmap toward broader automation agents built on top of this foundation. The more data the platform ingests, the smarter and more differentiated the AI layer becomes.

news.Title: SpaceX Valuation Push Tests Limits of Growth Premium
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

SpaceX filed confidentially for a U.S. IPO last week in what could be the largest stock market listing on record. The company is targeting a $1.75 trillion valuation and aims to raise more than $75 billion, which would put it just below Nvidia ( NASDAQ:NVDA ), Apple ( NASDAQ:AAPL ), Alphabet ( NASDAQ:GOOG ), and Amazon ( NASDAQ:AMZN ), and ahead of Meta Platforms ( NASDAQ:META ) and even Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ), the other company Elon Musk runs.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 4 Warning Signs with NVDA.

Is NVDA fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

Demand appears strong. Secondary market activity has already pushed valuations above $1.5 trillion. Investors are accepting complex and opaque ownership structures for early access to shares.

However, the multiples are stretched. At $1.75 trillion, SpaceX would trade at roughly 56x revenue and 109x EBITDA based on 2025 estimates, multiples that dwarf even Palantir (PLTR) and Tesla, two of Wall Street's priciest names.

Starlink carries the valuation today, contributing an estimated 50% to 80% of revenue across more than 10 million subscribers. Beyond that, much of the implied value reflects future bets, including Starship, AI-linked satellite infrastructure, and integration with adjacent ventures tied to Elon Musk's broader ecosystem.

news.Title: The Case for Ethereum as the Most Useful Cryptocurrency in Existence
news.Content:
In many ways, referring to Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) as only a "cryptocurrency" does it a major disservice. Ethereum is much more than that -- it is also a blockchain ecosystem and a global, decentralized computing platform used by both individuals and large organizations.

In short, a case can be made for Ethereum as the most useful cryptocurrency in existence. If you are looking for a defensive play to add to your portfolio during the current market downturn, look no further than Ethereum.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Ethereum is "programmable money"

One way to think about Ethereum is as "programmable money." Thanks to its pioneering use of smart contracts (self-executing pieces of computer code), Ethereum introduced investors to the world of decentralized finance (DeFi). Once Ethereum launched, it became possible to borrow, lend, and trade without the need for a financial intermediary.

Today, Ethereum remains a DeFi powerhouse. It accounts for the majority (57%) of Total Value Locked (TVL) in the world. It has also become one of the most popular blockchains for trading on decentralized exchanges . And it has become the place to earn yield on digital assets.

No wonder, then, that some have referred to Ethereum as the preferred blockchain of Wall Street. When top banks and financial institutions want to launch new tokenized assets, they turn to Ethereum. When they are looking to implement new stablecoin initiatives, they turn to Ethereum.

Ethereum's utility for the individual investor

But it would be a mistake to think that Ethereum is only for the titans of Wall Street. There is also a strong consumer-facing side to Ethereum that has made it the most popular Layer 1 blockchain network in the world, with a very loyal blockchain developer base.

For example, the world of non-fungible tokens (NFTs) is dominated by Ethereum. While the idea of buying silly cartoon images of apes for tens of thousands of dollars has long faded from memory, there are plenty of other uses for NFTs that have been leveraged by artistic creators, including top musicians.

Best of all, new uses for the Ethereum blockchain are continually being found. According to Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, the next frontier is artificial intelligence. According to some analysts, autonomous AI agents will soon be coordinating and transacting among themselves, and they will be doing so using Ethereum's blockchain rails.

Story Continues

Why is Ethereum down 60%?

If that's the case, surely Ethereum should be skyrocketing in value now, right? Unfortunately, that's not the case. Ethereum is down 30% in 2026, and nearly 60% from its all-time high of $4,954 in August. Something clearly is amiss.

It's easy to blame it all on geopolitics or on macroeconomic uncertainty. But there might be a deeper reason at play. Based on the above analysis of Ethereum, doesn't it sound a lot like software?

And that's the problem. At one time, software was eating the world. Now, AI is eating software. As a result, investors are concerned that, in the age of AI, software is no longer as valuable as it once was. That has pushed down the price of software stocks and also helped to push down the price of Ethereum.

From my perspective, though, Ethereum's extraordinary utility continues to make it a strong play. For good reason, the White House has referred to Ethereum as a strategic asset. And, for good reason, Wall Street continues to embrace Ethereum. Add it all up, and Ethereum could be significantly undervalued right now.

news.Title: 3 Industrial Dividend Stocks for Reliable Income in 2026
news.Content:
Investors seek dividend stocks as a haven during economic uncertainty, and one sector investors can turn to is industrials.

Broadly, the sector is filled with mature companies that offer stability through reliable cash flows, enabling them to continuously pay out dividends. The catch with industrials is that it's often a cyclical sector, which can lead to lofty valuation metrics at times. Of course, high expectations aren't always an issue, so long as a company can execute.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

These three companies -- Eaton (NYSE: ETN) , 3M (NYSE: MMM) , and Illinois Tool Works (NYSE: ITW) -- all have strong business models that can deliver reliable income through dividend payouts in 2026 and beyond.

1. Eaton

Eaton is the definition of diversification, as it manufactures everything from golf grips to life support systems.

One of its most interesting characteristics is as a pick-and-shovel investment in the artificial intelligence (AI) market and the broad tech sector through its energy storage systems, utility and grid solutions, and several additional offerings. In Q4 2025, its Electrical Americas data center orders were up 200%, with revenue up 40% compared to Q4 2024.

The dividend payout has a yield on the lower side at 1.2%, but Eaton has paid out a dividend each year since 1923, offering plenty of consistency for income investors.

It's also offered meaningful stock price appreciation as a bonus, climbing nearly 160% over the last five years.

To offer a point of comparison for how these companies stack up against each other in terms of valuation, Eaton has a forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 27.

2. 3M

Much like Eaton, 3M is a diversified manufacturer, and if you work in an office or have a home office, there's a good chance you have some of its products nearby. It owns the sticky note brand Post-it and the go-to-tape brand, Scotch.

Those are the types of products that quietly help 3M generate billions in revenue. The company performed well last year by improving sales, operating margin, and earnings per share (EPS). Sales ticked up from $23.6 billion in 2024 to $24.2 billion, and operating margins of 21.4% in 2024 climbed to 23.4% in 2025. EPS jumped from $7.30 in 2024 to $8.06, and that momentum may continue into 2026.

For 2026, 3M expects organic sales growth of 3% and its EPS range to be between $8.50 and $8.70.

Story Continues

Like Eaton, the company has a reliable history of dividend payouts, continuously paying one for over 100 years.

Its current dividend yield is 2.1%, and as the stock price is down over the last five years, the main focus with this company will be on that dividend payout.

It has a forward P/E ratio of 16.6.

3. Illinois Tool Works

Illinois Tool operates seven segments, encompassing everything from automotive to food equipment.

Its automotive segment accounts for the bulk of its revenue at 20%, while its test and measurement and electronics division isn't far behind at 18%.

Total revenue nudged slightly higher last year, climbing from $15.9 billion in 2024 to $16 billion in 2025.

With the dividend yielding nearly 2.5% and the stock price significantly underperforming the S&P 500 over the last five years, the focus for owning shares of Illinois Tool Works should also be on reliable income for 2026 and beyond.

For 62 consecutive years, it has raised dividends.

Illinois Tool Works has a forward P/E ratio of 22.6.

news.Title: Why I'm Buying Growth Stocks While Everyone Else Is Panic-Selling Tech
news.Content:
The war with Iran brought about a major shift in the stock market.

While energy stocks have (not surprisingly) gotten a boost, there has been a general rotation out of technology and large-cap growth stocks and into value and small-cap stocks. Part of this can be because of fears that a prolonged conflict could eventually lead to a global recession. In these periods, value stocks generally tend to outperform.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

The other reason for the rotation out of tech stocks is the fear that the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure boom could be peaking. The five largest hyperscalers (owners of large data centers) are set to spend around $700 billion on AI infrastructure this year. That's more than the gross domestic product of all but two dozen countries. As such, it's not crazy to think this spending needs to slow down and can't continue forever.

Meanwhile, some investors have questioned the return on these AI investments and the lifespan of these chips. However, Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) has said that its seven- to eight-year-old tensor processing units (TPUs) remain 100% utilized, while neocloud provider CoreWeave has says that its five-year-old graphics processing units (GPUs) are still fully booked.

The rental rate on these chips is down 70% from peak levels, but they are still generating revenue, and older-generation chips are often transitioned from high-intensity training to inference.

With all the major cloud computing providers being capacity-constrained and spending huge amounts on AI infrastructure, it's difficult to believe that these companies are not getting good returns on their spending.

What I think most validates this is that the leading foundry, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC for short), greatly upped its own capital expenditures (capex) to increase its capacity to produce advanced chips. This is huge because there is no company with more at stake than TSMC. If Alphabet and Microsoft overspend on AI data centers, that's just a small blip. If TSMC builds a lot of fabrication facilities that are going to sit idle, that's a major blow to its entire business.

The company did not make its spending plans lightly, and most certainly got a clear picture of the long-term economics of the AI cloud computing business. Right now, AI is a race, but it is also a profitable one for companies throughout the entire system. Chip obsolescence is real, but you can be sure the largest companies in the world aren't all spending completely frivolously.

Story Continues

That is why I'm buying tech growth stocks while the market is panicking. Here are some of my favorites.

Alphabet and Amazon: The cloud giants

Alphabet and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) are two of the companies spending heavily on AI infrastructure, and both are seeing strong growth in their cloud computing units. Amazon has one of the best histories of turning heavy investment cycles into strong, durable profit growth, while few companies have been at the forefront of innovation as much as Alphabet.

Alphabet has gained a big cost edge over most of its competitors by having developed its own top-tier AI chips. It is smartly pressing this lead through its data center investments. And while Amazon's chips are not on par with Alphabet's TPUs, the company has created its own custom chips, which it has used to power a large data center from Anthropic.

Broadcom and AMD: Riding favorable trends

Two other AI growth stocks I've added are Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) and Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) , since both companies have trends working in their favor. For Broadcom, it's the increase in chip cluster sizes, which is benefiting its networking portfolio, and the gradual shift toward custom AI chips. The company helped Alphabet develop its TPUs, and now other companies are rushing to develop their own custom chips with its help.

AMD, meanwhile, is set to benefit from agentic AI evolution. The company is the leader in server central processing units (CPUs), and data centers are going to need a lot more CPUs in the coming years to handle the needs of AI agents. This is a huge trend that should help fuel AMD's growth.

Growth continues to be where to invest

Growth stocks have easily outperformed value stocks for much of the past two decades. While value stocks will have their strong stretches, growth is still what will power the market over the long term.

news.Title: Retail investors are buying the dip in Tesla stock
news.Content:
The bottom hunters are stalking Tesla's ( TSLA ) battered stock price.

Tesla has seen a strong $256 million in retail inflows over the past five days and consistent dip-buying, the team at Vanda Research wrote in a new note. The influx of cash reflects "strong" conviction in Tesla, Vanda said.

More from Yahoo Scout

Why are retail investors heavily buying Tesla stock?

What are analysts saying about Tesla's future prospects?

What factors contributed to Tesla's poor performance?

How does Tesla compare to other Magnificent Seven stocks?

By comparison, demand to buy other names in the "Magnificent Seven" complex, such as Nvidia ( NVDA ), Meta ( META ), and Microsoft ( MSFT ), has cooled, according to Vanda's data.

"Retail remains engaged, but flows are less aggressive, more tactical, and increasingly selective, with a growing defensive bias under the hood," Vanda added.

Tesla shares are already down 23% this year, making it the worst-performing member of the Magnificent Seven.

The stock's horrible year so far reflects several factors.

Tesla delivered 358,023 vehicles in the first quarter, missing analyst estimates of roughly 366,000 to 370,000 units. Although this represents a 6.3% increase year over year, the growth came from a depressed baseline, and the absolute numbers showed a significant sequential decline from the record-breaking fourth quarter of last year.

The expiration of the $7,500 federal electric vehicle tax credit in the US at the end of last year at the hands of the Trump administration dealt a major blow to domestic demand for electric vehicles. Additionally, persistent high interest rates have made vehicle financing more expensive for the average buyer.

Meanwhile, Tesla is facing brutal pressure from Chinese electric vehicle rivals like BYD ( BYDDY ), as well as legacy automakers such as Mercedes-Benz ( MBG.DE ), General Motors ( GM ), and Ford ( F ), who continue to forge ahead with EV production, though at a slower pace.

"With expectations for Tesla performance having collapsed for all financial and performance metrics across all time periods through the end of the decade, the +50% rise in Tesla shares and +32% increase in analyst price targets as this collapse has taken place implies an expectation for a sharp pivot to materially better than earlier expected performance in the time beyond this decade," JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman wrote in a note out on Monday.

"We advise investors [to] cautiously approach this expectation within the context of both execution risk and the time value of money," he said.

Brinkman reiterated a Sell rating on Tesla. His $145 price target estimates Tesla's stock plunging about 60% from current levels.

Added Brinkman, "Investors should in our view be mindful when assessing the implied inflection higher in Tesla performance starting sometime beyond this decade (when results are presumably expected to begin tracking materially stronger than earlier expected, in contrast to materially weaker than earlier expected)."

Story Continues

news.Title: Here's What to Expect From KLA Corporation's Next Earnings Report
news.Content:
Valued at a market cap of $201.9 billion, KLA Corporation (KLAC) designs, manufactures, and markets process control, process-enabling, and yield management solutions for the semiconductor and related electronics industries. The Milpitas, California-based company is expected to announce its fiscal Q3 earnings for 2026 in the near future.

Before this event, analysts expect this tech company to report a profit of $9.16 per share, up 8.9% from $8.41 per share in the year-ago quarter. The company has topped Wall Street’s bottom-line estimates in each of the last four quarters. Its earnings of $8.85 per share in the previous quarter outpaced the forecasted figure by a slight margin.

More News from Barchart

Penny Stock Xiao-I Is Surging on Apple Patent Win. Should You Buy Little-Known AIXI Now?

Dear Google Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for April 23

Stocks Recover on Iran Ceasefire Hopes

Our exclusive Barchart Brief newsletter is your FREE midday guide to what's moving stocks, sectors, and investor sentiment - delivered right when you need the info most. Subscribe today!

For the current fiscal year, ending in June, analysts expect KLAC to report a profit of $36.62 per share, up 10% from $33.28 per share in fiscal 2025. Furthermore, its EPS is expected to grow 29.3% year-over-year to $47.35 in fiscal 2027.

KLAC has rallied 156.2% over the past 52 weeks, significantly outperforming both the S&P 500 Index's ($SPX) 30.7% return and the State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF’s (XLK) 49.8% uptick over the same time period.

On Apr. 1, shares of KLAC rose 3.2% after the company unveiled a new $7 billion share repurchase authorization. When combined with the remaining capacity from its previous program, the total amount available for buybacks climbed to around $11 billion. That represents roughly 5.8% of the company’s market value, making it a notably large capital return plan. Moves of this size are often viewed as a sign of confidence from management, indicating they see strong fundamentals ahead and consider the stock attractively valued.

Wall Street analysts are moderately optimistic about KLAC’s stock, with a "Moderate Buy" rating overall. Among 28 analysts covering the stock, 15 recommend "Strong Buy," three advise "Moderate Buy,” and 10 suggest "Hold." The mean price target for KLAC is $1,726.31, indicating an 11.5% potential upside from the current levels.

news.Title: High Dividends Turn Telecom Stocks Into Market’s New Haven Play
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) — An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks.

After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising 9.6% while the broad benchmark is down 3.3%. Shares of Verizon Communication ( VZ ) Inc. are up more than 19% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. ( T ) has gained 13%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index ( ^NDX ) fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomberg gauge of the Magnificent Seven tech giants has tumbled 13% from its October high.

The reason for the divergence is fairly simple. With the economic outlook increasingly dicey, investors are prioritizing predictable cash flows and above-average dividend income, which the telecoms provide, according to Sergey Dluzhevskiy, portfolio manager at Gabelli Funds.

“You have a market rotation away from some of the technology-oriented names and the AI trade broadly to more defensive sectors,” Dluzhevskiy said.

The dividend yield for the S&P 500 Communications Services Industry Group Index is 4.3%, roughly in line with the yield on 10-year Treasuries, which fell below 4% in late February and early March. Individually, Verizon shares boast a 5.6% dividend, while Comcast Corp.’s ( CMCSA ) payout is 4.8%.

“When you have Treasury yields go lower, higher-yielding dividend stocks look attractive,” said Randy Hare, a portfolio manager at Huntington National Bank. “Your dividend aristocrats are outperforming the market.”

Dividend stocks are favored by investors who are worried about future growth and want to protect their portfolios in times of market turmoil by generating predictable returns. That aligns with the current market sentiment, where the destabilization brought on by the Iran war is running into concerns about the billions of dollars megacap tech companies are spending to build out the infrastructure for artificial intelligence. Those AI investments are propping up a wide array of industries and stocks that could slump if the capital expenditures slow.

“In an age in which people become nervous about growth — and I think that, you know, in 2026 we’ve seen that pretty substantially — people start looking at downside protection,” said Bill Mann, chief investment officer and portfolio manager at Motley Fool Wealth Management. As such, a dividend “becomes a natural attractor for investors.”

Verizon shares have been leading the telecom group this year, soaring 23% in the first quarter, their best quarterly performance since 2010, after losing 7.3% in the final quarter of 2025. The rally started in January after the company reported its largest gain in mobile phone subscribers in seven years and expanded its buyback program to as much as $25 billion over the next three years. AT&T’s stock price also jumped after a stronger-than anticipated earnings report.

Story Continues

Even the big telecommunications stocks that aren’t in the green for 2026 are beating the market. T-Mobile US Inc. shares are down 1.2% this year and Comcast Corp. shares have shed 0.8%, both of which are better than the performance of the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100. Plus, the stocks provide solid dividend yields — Comcast’s is about 4.8%, while T-Mobile’s is 1.9%.

Telecommunications companies are also part of the popular HALO trade, which is short for high asset and low obsolescence. Their fiber-optic cables, cellular towers, data centers and more are seen as providing staying power in an evolving economic environment. In other words, while they’re also investing in AI for their internal operations, customer service and network performance, they are more insulated from the build-out race than other parts of the technology industry.

“You can’t replace fiber optic telephone lines with AI,” said Hare.

While dividend stocks may not generate the stratospheric returns of the market’s highest fliers, like the recent boom in memory and storage shares, they can offer some protection from losses. And in the case of telecom companies, they also have reliable businesses providing services that are essential to US consumers.

“I think the pandemic proved, and truly highlighted, the essential nature of silicon network and broad digital infrastructure as well as the value of connectivity in today’s economy,” Gabelli’s Dluzhevskiy said. “In the recessionary scenario, people may cut other bills but will hold onto their wireless and broadband services. I think the combination of many of those factors played into a strong performance for those things.”

Tech Chart of the Day

Top Tech Stories

Elon Musk is seeking to have OpenAI Chief Executive Officer and board member Sam Altman removed from his roles at the artificial intelligence startup as part of the billionaire’s legal challenge to the ChatGPT maker’s conversion to a for-profit company.

Apple Inc.’s first foldable phone is on track to arrive during the company’s normal iPhone launch period later this year, people with knowledge of the matter said, rebutting concerns about major manufacturing snags.

Anthropic PBC is letting tech firms access a more powerful, unreleased artificial intelligence model to help prepare for possible cyberattacks that might result from the company making the advanced AI system more widely available.

Intel Corp. is joining Elon Musk’s long-shot effort to develop semiconductors for Tesla Inc., SpaceX and xAI, marking a surprising twist in the chipmaker’s comeback bid.

Super Micro Computer Inc. said a committee of its independent directors has hired a law firm and is investigating the circumstances surrounding an indictment last month of two employees and a contractor over the sale of servers to China.

news.Title: Is the AI Gold Rush Over? Costco and Walmart Just Delivered a Sobering $163 Billion Warning to Shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and Other Red-Hot AI Stocks.
news.Content:
Over the past three years, artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have driven overall market gains -- investors, from the smallest retail investor to billionaire hedge fund managers, have piled into these players. And it's very easy to understand why. AI promises to shake up the way many things are done, and in a positive way -- the technology may help companies gain efficiency, develop better products faster, and more. And all of this equals cost savings and revenue growth.

So investors rushed to get in on big AI names such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) , and other companies playing a big role in the field. These two advanced more than 1,100% and 2,600%, respectively, over the past three calendar years.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

But over the past few months, the mood in the stock market has changed. Investors, seeing valuations of AI stocks soar, began to worry about these levels -- and questioned whether they were sustainable. On top of this, turmoil in Iran and uncertainty about U.S. economic growth also weighed on investors' minds.

All of this hurt shares of AI players, including Nvidia and Palantir. So it's fair to ask: Is the AI gold rush over? Here, we may turn to a surprising source for some answers: Costco (NASDAQ: COST) and Walmart (NASDAQ: WMT) . They recently delivered a particularly sobering warning to shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and the AI market in general.

Getting in early on a hot technology

As mentioned, Nvidia and other top AI stocks have roared higher in recent years as investors eagerly rushed to the latest important development in the world of technology. History has shown us how getting in early on game-changing innovators may supercharge the performance of a portfolio. We can use the examples of smartphone giant Apple and e-commerce leader Amazon as examples.

We can see the extent of gains since Apple launched the first iPhone in 2007, and after Amazon's profit passed the billion-dollar mark about 15 years ago. (And, importantly, these companies continue to deliver growth.)

So, investors may hope for similar returns as they pile into shares of companies leading in the new high-growth market of AI . Analysts expect the AI market to reach into the trillions of dollars by the end of the decade, so there could be a lot to gain by buying AI stocks early in the growth story.

Story Continues

But the recent market environment hasn't favored AI stocks -- as mentioned above, various concerns have weighed on their performance. And that leads me to the subject of Costco and Walmart. I probably don't have to introduce these retail giants to you, as you may shop at their stores regularly for groceries, essentials, and even discretionary items.

Now here's the warning from Costco and Walmart to shareholders of the most prominent AI stocks: In the first quarter, Costco and Walmart stock largely outperformed Nvidia stock.

As a result, the retailers gained $60 billion and $103 billion in market cap, respectively, during the period. Meanwhile, Nvidia lost $300 billion in market value.

Investors opt for safety

This suggests that investors clearly rotated out of the stock market darling and into companies that may be seen as "safer" in a difficult environment. The performance of the Vanguard Consumer Staples ETF further reflects this trend, as it gained more than 6% in the quarter. This exchanged-traded fund's biggest positions are in -- surprise! -- Walmart and Costco. Other top positions include Coca-Cola and Procter & Gamble , names that can maintain a certain level of revenue growth during any market environment, as consumers favor buying the items they truly need.

The idea here is that AI stocks may stagnate or even continue to decline as investors, seeking safety in a turbulent environment, abandon them for other industries.

Does this mean the AI gold rush is over? Not necessarily. Stocks such as Nvidia may be down now, but evidence doesn't support the idea of them being out. Tech companies continue to report strong demand for AI products and services, and customers are just beginning to put AI to use in the real world -- the real-world use of AI involves chips, networking tools, and entire data centers. So as long as companies and individuals are using AI, many companies supplying key components and services are set to continue winning from an earnings perspective.

How should you invest today?

All of this should translate into stock performance, too. So what does this mean for investors today? It's impossible to predict how long market uncertainty will last, but history has shown us that it's never permanent. Though Costco, Walmart, and other consumer staples stocks truly illustrate the current trend, this warning doesn't signal that the AI boom is over.

This means that investors in AI stocks should patiently hold onto quality positions and even consider adding to their portfolios when valuations look interesting. Even if we don't see a massive stampede into AI in the coming months, many companies involved in this hot technology still have what it takes to deliver explosive stock performance over the long run.

news.Title: Is the AI Gold Rush Over? Costco and Walmart Just Delivered a Sobering $163 Billion Warning to Shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and Other Red-Hot AI Stocks.
news.Content:
Over the past three years, artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have driven overall market gains -- investors, from the smallest retail investor to billionaire hedge fund managers, have piled into these players. And it's very easy to understand why. AI promises to shake up the way many things are done, and in a positive way -- the technology may help companies gain efficiency, develop better products faster, and more. And all of this equals cost savings and revenue growth.

So investors rushed to get in on big AI names such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) , and other companies playing a big role in the field. These two advanced more than 1,100% and 2,600%, respectively, over the past three calendar years.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

But over the past few months, the mood in the stock market has changed. Investors, seeing valuations of AI stocks soar, began to worry about these levels -- and questioned whether they were sustainable. On top of this, turmoil in Iran and uncertainty about U.S. economic growth also weighed on investors' minds.

All of this hurt shares of AI players, including Nvidia and Palantir. So it's fair to ask: Is the AI gold rush over? Here, we may turn to a surprising source for some answers: Costco (NASDAQ: COST) and Walmart (NASDAQ: WMT) . They recently delivered a particularly sobering warning to shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and the AI market in general.

Getting in early on a hot technology

As mentioned, Nvidia and other top AI stocks have roared higher in recent years as investors eagerly rushed to the latest important development in the world of technology. History has shown us how getting in early on game-changing innovators may supercharge the performance of a portfolio. We can use the examples of smartphone giant Apple and e-commerce leader Amazon as examples.

We can see the extent of gains since Apple launched the first iPhone in 2007, and after Amazon's profit passed the billion-dollar mark about 15 years ago. (And, importantly, these companies continue to deliver growth.)

So, investors may hope for similar returns as they pile into shares of companies leading in the new high-growth market of AI . Analysts expect the AI market to reach into the trillions of dollars by the end of the decade, so there could be a lot to gain by buying AI stocks early in the growth story.

Story Continues

But the recent market environment hasn't favored AI stocks -- as mentioned above, various concerns have weighed on their performance. And that leads me to the subject of Costco and Walmart. I probably don't have to introduce these retail giants to you, as you may shop at their stores regularly for groceries, essentials, and even discretionary items.

Now here's the warning from Costco and Walmart to shareholders of the most prominent AI stocks: In the first quarter, Costco and Walmart stock largely outperformed Nvidia stock.

As a result, the retailers gained $60 billion and $103 billion in market cap, respectively, during the period. Meanwhile, Nvidia lost $300 billion in market value.

Investors opt for safety

This suggests that investors clearly rotated out of the stock market darling and into companies that may be seen as "safer" in a difficult environment. The performance of the Vanguard Consumer Staples ETF further reflects this trend, as it gained more than 6% in the quarter. This exchanged-traded fund's biggest positions are in -- surprise! -- Walmart and Costco. Other top positions include Coca-Cola and Procter & Gamble , names that can maintain a certain level of revenue growth during any market environment, as consumers favor buying the items they truly need.

The idea here is that AI stocks may stagnate or even continue to decline as investors, seeking safety in a turbulent environment, abandon them for other industries.

Does this mean the AI gold rush is over? Not necessarily. Stocks such as Nvidia may be down now, but evidence doesn't support the idea of them being out. Tech companies continue to report strong demand for AI products and services, and customers are just beginning to put AI to use in the real world -- the real-world use of AI involves chips, networking tools, and entire data centers. So as long as companies and individuals are using AI, many companies supplying key components and services are set to continue winning from an earnings perspective.

How should you invest today?

All of this should translate into stock performance, too. So what does this mean for investors today? It's impossible to predict how long market uncertainty will last, but history has shown us that it's never permanent. Though Costco, Walmart, and other consumer staples stocks truly illustrate the current trend, this warning doesn't signal that the AI boom is over.

This means that investors in AI stocks should patiently hold onto quality positions and even consider adding to their portfolios when valuations look interesting. Even if we don't see a massive stampede into AI in the coming months, many companies involved in this hot technology still have what it takes to deliver explosive stock performance over the long run.

news.Content: 美伊達成共識，雙方協議停火兩周，並暫時恢復合姆茲海峽通航，中東衝突風險降溫，全球股市反應走揚，亞股大漲帶動主要亞幣強升，台股終場飆漲逾1,500點，創史上第二 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊達成共識，雙方協議停火兩周，暫時恢復合姆茲海峽通航，中東衝突風險降溫，全球股市反應走揚。
• 台股終場飆漲逾1,500點，創史上第二大漲點；新台幣兌美元匯率同步站上31.7元價位。
• 外資回頭買超1,177.72億元，創史上第二大買超，熱錢大量湧入，主導新台幣走勢。
• 匯銀主管認為，後續新台幣有機會逐步反彈，下一波先挑戰31.6元價位。
• 市場對戰爭反應已鈍化，股匯波動都有收斂，預期新台幣升幅不會太過劇烈。

news.Title: Microsoft Pulled Back. Buying Opportunity or Warning Sign?
news.Content: The knock on Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) stock in 2026 is self-explanatory: Capital expenditures (capex) are ballooning, Azure growth is moving a half-step slower than Wall Street demands, and an uncomfortable portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI. The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs -- its worst ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft faces concerns regarding ballooning capital expenditures and slower Azure growth.
• A significant portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI.
• The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs, its worst drawdown since 2008.
• Meta Platforms' AI investments were cheered by Wall Street, unlike Microsoft's infrastructure spending narrative.
• Copilot adoption rates have been slower than initially hyped, but enterprise adoption is growing, with customer seats tripling year-over-year.
news.Keywords: capital expenditures, Azure growth, cloud backlog, AI investment narrative, Copilot adoption

news.Title: 台股還有便宜股票可撿？他曝1投資心法：台灣只會越來越值錢
news.Content:
財經中心／周希雯報導

台股經歷先前連日重挫，隨著美國宣布與伊朗達成「停火2週」的協議，談判曙光令投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）以34761點作收、上漲1531點，創歷史第二大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股經歷先前連日重挫後，隨著美伊達成停火協議，投資人信心大增，今日收盤上漲1531點，創歷史第二大漲幅。
• 財經網美胡采蘋打破迷思，認為「不會再有便宜的東西了，台灣只會越來越值錢」。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，從8000點漲到3萬多點，是因為疫情奇蹟及AI起飛。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為「便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字」，股價高的股票只要一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

news.Title: Tesla Stock Pulled Back 26.2% After a Monster Run. Is It Time to Buy the Dip?
news.Content: Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) valuation can seem a little confusing. Even after a sharp decline, shares still trade at nearly 14 times sales. Rivian , another EV stock , trades at just over 3 times sales. To be clear, I'm still a big fan of Rivian stock. I think it's clearly undervalued . But that doesn't mean I think Tesla stock is overvalued. In fact, there's reason to believe Tesla could add another $1 trillion to its market cap over the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's valuation is being examined after a 26.2% pullback.
• Full autonomy and robotaxis are identified as key growth areas for Tesla.
• Experts predict large-scale robo-taxi deployment by 2030, with potential for significant market value.
• Cathie Wood believes robotaxis could account for over 90% of Tesla's enterprise value by the decade's end.
• The robotaxi market is estimated to be worth $5 trillion to $10 trillion long-term.
news.Keywords: Tesla valuation, full autonomy, robotaxis, AI investment, market growth

news.Title: The 2 Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy Now. They Could Soar 35% and 50%, According to Wall Street.
news.Content: Year to date, analysts have raised first-quarter earnings estimates across technology stocks more significantly than any other market sector, and upward revisions over the last month have been particularly pronounced in Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) . Upward revisions to forward earnings estimates are often a catalyst for share price appreciation, but Palantir and Micron have declined modestly in the last month. I ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies and Micron Technology have seen upward earnings estimate revisions.
• Palantir's median target price implies 35% upside, while Micron's implies 50% upside.
• Palantir's Q4 revenue increased 70% to $1.4 billion, with a record Rule of 40 score of 127%.
• Micron reported Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue increase of 196% to $23.8 billion, driven by DRAM and HBM sales.
• Micron's non-GAAP earnings increased 682% to $12.20 per diluted share.
news.Keywords: earnings estimate revisions, AI stocks, revenue growth, EPS growth, price targets

news.AI_Summary:
• 群益投信展望第二季，AI仍是台股市場主旋律，資金預期將在AI子產業中輪動，特別是先進封裝、載板、光通訊及測試介面等類股。

news.Title: Prediction: The AI Bubble Is Readying to Pop, With These 4 Factors Tipping Off Investors
news.Content: Roughly 30 years ago, the advent and proliferation of the internet changed corporate America forever. It opened new doors for businesses that didn't previously exist, as well as gave rise to the retail investor revolution by tearing down the information barrier that had existed between Wall Street and Main Street for over a century. For decades, investors have waited, often impatiently, for the next technological leap forward to take shape. Artificial intelligence (AI) has answered that call, and foundational AI stocks, such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , have ascended to the heavens. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article predicts a potential AI bubble burst due to four factors.
• Historical parallels are drawn to the dot-com bubble, emphasizing the optimization curve for new technologies.
• AI stock valuations and the broader market are considered historically pricey.
• Waning hardware scarcity is identified as a potential drag on AI superstars.
• Palantir Technologies' P/S ratio over 100 is cited as a 'bubble' indicator.
news.Keywords: AI bubble, valuation, optimization curve, hardware scarcity, market correction

news.Title: Want to Own Stock in SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic Pre-IPO? Here's How.
news.Content: Private companies SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic are three of the most highly anticipated initial public offerings (IPOs) on the horizon. SpaceX recently filed the necessary paperwork with the SEC, but all three companies could host IPOs before the end of 2026. However, retail investors can get exposure to all three companies today through the Ark Venture Fund (NASDAQMUTFUND: ARKVX) . Here are the important details. Will AI create the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic are anticipated IPOs, with potential listings before the end of 2026.
• Retail investors can gain exposure through the Ark Venture Fund.
• SpaceX targets an IPO valuation of up to $2 trillion after merging with xAI.
• OpenAI's annual revenue run rate topped $25 billion in February 2026, with enterprise revenue projected to grow.
• Anthropic's annual revenue run rate topped $30 billion in April 2026, with strong enterprise product focus.
news.Keywords: IPO pipeline, venture fund, SpaceX valuation, OpenAI revenue, Anthropic revenue

news.Title: 《日股》美伊停火2周/風險偏好回升 日經大漲5.39%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 16:20:50 數位內容中心 發佈

由於美國總統川普同意暫停轟炸伊朗兩週、宣稱啟動「雙邊停火」，油價下跌，帶動 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 由於美國總統川普同意暫停轟炸伊朗兩週，油價下跌，帶動日股8日大幅上漲，日經225指數收於56308.42點，上漲2878.86點或5.39%。
• 市場風險偏好迅速回升，WTI原油期貨一度急跌至約91美元，帶動股市強彈。
• 停戰消息使原油風險溢酬回檔，對全球風險資產形成提振，但預期原油與航運成本回復還需時日。
• 資源與海運類股承壓，資金自先前受惠原油與航運族群撤出，轉向景氣敏感或估值修正空間較大類股。
• 半導體與電機等成長類股成為主要推升力量，Advantest、東京威力科創等個股表現強勢。
news.Keywords: 日股,日經指數,美伊停火,油價,風險偏好,原油,航運,半導體,成長股

news.Title: Nvidia, Apple, and Alphabet Could Help This Marvelous Vanguard ETF Turn $250,000 Into $1 Million After the Stock Market Sell-Off
news.Content: The stock market is currently in the throes of a broad-based sell-off because of the ongoing tensions in the Middle East. The S&P 500 index is currently down by 5.3% from its all-time high and was down as much as 9% a week ago. The Nasdaq-100 technology index plummeted as much as 12% before recovering somewhat to now be down about 7.8%. Throughout history, broad market dips have presented long-term investors with an opportunity to buy high-quality stocks at a discount. The Vanguard Mega Cap Growth ETF (NYSEMKT: MGK) is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Vanguard Mega Cap Growth ETF (MGK) is down 13% from its all-time high due to a market sell-off.
• Top holdings include AI powerhouses Nvidia, Apple, and Alphabet.
• Nvidia's market capitalization exploded from $360 billion to $4.3 trillion.
• Apple's custom chips are integrated into its devices, positioning it as a major consumer AI distributor.
• Alphabet's AI features in Google Search are driving advertising revenue growth, and Google Cloud revenue is accelerating.
news.Keywords: ETF performance, AI exposure, market sell-off, top holdings, revenue growth

news.Title: 大立光敲定4/16與台積電同日召開法說會 林恩平將釋營運展望
news.Content: 光學元件股股王大立光 (3008-TW) 敲定 4 月 16 日與台積電 (2330-TW) 同日召開召開法人說明會，除公布 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 大立光敲定4月16日與台積電同日召開法說會，將公布第一季獲利成績並釋出營運展望。
• 法人關注新廠加入後的大立光產能利用率及毛利率能否持穩。
• 大立光3月營收54.2億元，月增17.48%，年增10.77%，預估4月營運動能將下滑。
• 大立光1-3月營收155.44億元，季減9.72%，年增6.62%，為歷史同期新高。
• 大立光開發手機應用可變光圈鏡頭，預計第三季出貨，將影響客戶新機訂單比重及高階鏡頭滲透率。
news.Keywords: 大立光,法說會,台積電,營收,毛利率,產能利用率,AI,鏡頭

news.Title: 《台股盤後》飆升1531點、收復34K，創第二大漲點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 15:58:19 新聞中心 發佈

美國與伊朗達成停火兩週協議後、美股盤後電子盤及日韓股均強勢彈升，台股今(8)日亦開高走高，在台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊達成停火兩週協議後，美股盤後電子盤及日韓股均強勢彈升，台股7日開高走高。
• 台積電續強漲逾4%，台達電/奇鋐漲停，鴻海重返200大關，搭配雙D股、跌深台泥/外資點名的緯創表現亮眼，助攻人氣回籠。
• 加權指數終場收在最高點34761.38點，上漲1531.56點或4.61%，創史上收盤第二大漲點，成交量擴大至8562.6億元。
• 19大類股幾乎全面走揚，以玻璃陶瓷類股領漲9.3%，電子股收漲5.4%，電器電纜收漲4.4%。
• 三大法人今日總計買超1579.25億元，外資買超1177.72億元，自營商買超358.68億元，投信買超42.84億元。
news.Keywords: 台股,美伊停火,美股,日韓股,台積電,台達電,奇鋐,鴻海,玻璃陶瓷,電子股,三大法人

news.Title: 群益投信：Q2台股資金仍在AI子產業輪動，留意先進封裝、測試介面等
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】針對台股第二季投資展望，群益中小型股基金經理人周立民表示，儘管地緣政治衝突導致油價波動與短期震盪，但在AI需求全面爆發下，主計總處大幅上修今年經 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 群益中小型股基金經理人周立民表示，儘管地緣政治衝突導致油價波動與短期震盪，但在AI需求全面爆發下，台股基本面強韌，內外資有望重返台股。
• AI仍是市場主旋律，第二季資金預期將在AI子產業中輪動，特別是先進封裝、載板、光通訊以及測試介面等類股尤值留意。
• 群益美國增長ETF經理人吳承恕指出，在AI強勁需求驅動下，美股預期獲利成長有望再加速，AI族群表現可期。
• 群益東方盛世基金經理人洪玉婷認為，日本企業獲利有望達雙位數成長，資金回補空間大，日股後市可期。
• 建議投資人採取「SAFE」投資策略，聚焦AI趨勢，參與AI長線成長機會。
news.Keywords: 群益投信,台股,第二季展望,AI,先進封裝,載板,光通訊,測試介面,美股,日股

news.Title: 5 New Risks to Ethereum Just Surfaced. Is The Coin Still a Buy?
news.Content: According to a new paper released by Alphabet 's Google Quantum AI group on March 30, there are five distinct ways that a future quantum computer could attack Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) by breaking its encryption. That certainly sounds alarming. If everything the new research says is true, would the coin still be a buy? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google Quantum AI group published research on five ways quantum computers could attack Ethereum's encryption.
• The research suggests breaking Ethereum's cryptography could require fewer than 500,000 physical qubits.
• Quantum computers could compromise individual wallets, admin keys, and smart contracts.
• Potential existential risks include consensus attacks on the proof-of-stake system and data availability sampling.
• The Ethereum Foundation is working on migrating to quantum-resistant cryptography, targeting upgrades by 2029.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, Ethereum, encryption, cybersecurity, cryptography migration

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Just Got Hit by a Shift Not Seen in 13 years. Here's What Investors Should Do Next
news.Content: This has been a tough year thus far for Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) . Despite delivering record-breaking results and a stunning forecast, the stock continues to languish and has been treading water for more than eight months. There isn't any one thing holding back the artificial intelligence (AI) chipmaker, but a confluence of events that have kept the stock rangebound. The geopolitical backdrop, persistent inflation, and questions about the future adoption of AI have weighed on Nvidia's stock, and even some seasoned investors are beginning ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock has been rangebound for over eight months due to geopolitical backdrop, inflation, and AI adoption questions.
• Hedge funds are selling stocks at the fastest rate in 13 years, impacting major tech names like Nvidia.
• Nvidia delivered record revenue of $68 billion in fiscal 2026 Q4, up 73% year-over-year.
• Adjusted EPS surged 82% to $1.62, with an impressive gross margin of 71.1%.
• The company has visibility into a $500 billion backlog for Blackwell and Vera Rubin AI chips through 2026.
news.Keywords: stock performance, hedge fund activity, revenue growth, EPS growth, AI chip backlog

news.Title: 【0050加掛不配息有譜2】台積電條款？ETF加掛有雜音 證交所澄清
news.Content: 針對市場盛傳證交所朝開放ETF加掛不配息，且若有ETF「單一成分股超過30%恐被排除」的傳聞，證交所今（8）日否認，第一，該政策目前業者共識不足，且新募集ETF也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 針對市場傳聞ETF加掛不配息級別，證交所表示，業者共識不足，且新募集ETF沒有排除條款。
• 權重限制並非死板教條，考量台積電等個股權值擴張，實務上有彈性調整空間，最高可放寬至前五大合計65%。
• 開放ETF加掛不配息級別政策能否上路，仍在觀望、研究中，業者內部存在兩大分歧立場。
• 贊成派認為加掛級別能滿足投資人多元偏好；反對派擔憂「大者恆大」與辨識混淆。
• 證交所表示，需待業者達成共識並提出配套方案後，才會進一步討論推動時程。
news.Keywords: ETF,加掛級別,不配息,台積電,權重,證交所,投信,共識

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】NAND控制晶片群聯電子(8299)執行長潘健成表示，近期市場雖出現記憶體價格鬆動的雜音，但主要集中於零售（Retail）市場的短期供需波動，合約市場不受影響，並揭 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 群聯電子執行長潘健成表示，近期市場記憶體價格鬆動雜音集中於零售市場，合約市場不受影響。
• 群聯3月與第一季營收創下單月與單季新高，看好養『AI龍蝦(AI代理人)』商機。
• 潘健成指出，AI應用帶動PCIe SSD控制晶片總出貨量年增25%，NAND位元出貨量月增18%。
• 群聯長期深耕CSP、伺服器、AI應用與工控等高階客製化市場，佔營收70%以上，需求強勁且穩定。
• 推出aiDAPTIV混合型SSD方案，主打資料安全、降低AI推論成本，獲客戶追加訂單。
news.Keywords: 群聯,潘健成,記憶體,營收,AI,AI代理人,SSD,NAND,CSP,伺服器

news.Title: 【0050加掛不配息有譜1】 網友一面倒支持！ 恐因台積電難產？
news.Content: 近期凱基投信推出被市場稱為「不配息版 0050」的凱基台灣 TOP 50 ETF（00916），引發投資圈對不配息級別的強烈關注。這股熱潮也讓社群紛紛敲碗，希望國內最具指標性的元大台灣 50（0050）與富邦台 50（006208）能 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 凱基投信推出「不配息版0050」凱基台灣TOP50 ETF（009816），引發市場對不配息級別關注。
• 社群紛紛敲碗元大台灣50（0050）與富邦台50（006208）能推出不配息級別，認為「必買爆」。
• 消息指出，ETF加掛級別可能設「單一成分股權重不得超過30%」門檻，0050、006208因台積電權重過高恐被排除。
• 網友認為減少再投入成本和稅務，是長線投資福音，讓投資人自行決定現金流或資產成長。
• 周冠男指出，配息本質是「左手換右手」，且需課徵所得稅，建議投資不應迷信配息。
news.Keywords: ETF,0050,009816,不配息,台積電,權重,配息,長線投資,複利

news.Title: 【台股盤後】收漲1531點創史上第2大漲點　首見40檔千元股
news.Content: （中央社記者江明晏台北2026年04月8日電）台股今天開高走高，終場收在34761.38最高點，大漲1531.56點，為史上第2大收盤漲點；台積電終場漲90元，收1 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火兩週，台股今天開高走高，終場收在34761.38最高點，大漲1531.56點，為史上第2大收盤漲點。
• 台積電終場漲90元，收1950元，台達電、股王信驊、欣興漲停，改寫新天價。
• PCB、記憶體族群飆漲，包括欣興、台光電漲停，宜鼎、旺宏漲停，華邦電漲逾6%。
• AI族群續強，技嘉漲停，廣達、緯創漲逾6%，散熱股奇鋐、雙鴻漲停。
• 低軌衛星族群強漲昇達科漲逾9%、波若威漲停，啟碁、正文漲逾7%，面板股群創、友達強漲。
news.Keywords: 台股,漲點,台積電,台達電,信驊,欣興,PCB,記憶體,AI,散熱,低軌衛星,光通訊

news.Title: 台股閃現41千金終場首見40千金　14檔千元股漲停
news.Content: （中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年04月8日電）美國和伊朗同意停火兩週，日韓股市暴漲，台股今天飆漲1531.56點，創歷史第2大收盤漲點，股價超過千元的 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國和伊朗同意停火兩週，日韓股市暴漲，台股今天飆漲1531.56點，創歷史第2大收盤漲點。
• 股價超過千元的高價股強勢表態，盤中台股閃現「41千金」，終場首見「40千金」，共計14檔千金高價股高掛漲停。
• 股王信驊衝上漲停12615元，大漲1145元，超越3月18日高點，再創歷史新天價。
• 重返千金股行列的個股包括宜鼎、AES-KY、雙鴻等，金像電盤中一度站上千元。
• 穎崴、旺矽、台光電、奇鋐、嘉澤、致茂、群聯、台達電等終場均鎖住漲停。

news.AI_Summary:
• 群聯電子董事會決議發行海外第一次無擔保可轉換公司債，上限8億美元。
• 募得價款用途為支應外幣購料之資金需求。
• 本次發行包含A券及B券二種券別，總額度合計以美金八億元整為上限。
• 發行期間暫定為不超過5年，票面利率暫定為年利率0%。
• 群聯3月營收創歷史新高，AI代理人應用帶動儲存需求爆發。

news.Title: 3 Growth Stocks to Hold for the Next 20 Years
news.Content: While the market has recently cooled on growth stocks, there are still some great stocks to scoop up that could be long-term buys. Growth stocks have helped lead the market higher for much of the past two decades, and there is no reason to think that this trend can't continue over the next 20 years. After all, it is revenue and earnings growth that eventually help companies ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple has a strong business model and is a 'compounding machine' in the high-end smartphone and computer markets.
• Its ecosystem traps users, making switching difficult, and services/payments provide a high-margin recurring revenue stream.
• Amazon has grown through investment and innovation, dominating e-commerce and pioneering cloud computing.
• Amazon is investing in robotics, AI, and automation to enhance its e-commerce efficiency and extend its moat.
• Dutch Bros is a regional-to-national expansion story with strong same-store sales growth and plans for significant expansion.
news.Keywords: business model, ecosystem, e-commerce, cloud computing, expansion strategy

news.Title: Prediction: This AI Stock Will Be Worth More Than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir Combined by 2030
news.Content: Finding a stock that will be worth more than Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , and Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) combined seems like a far-fetched notion. Right now, these three stocks are worth $6.65 trillion combined. By 2030, this trio could be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is projected to be worth more than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir combined by 2030.
• Nvidia's GPUs are critical for AI workloads, driving significant growth since 2023.
• Analysts project 79% growth in Q1 and 85% in Q2, indicating continued AI demand.
• Nvidia anticipates data center capital expenditures to reach $3 trillion to $4 trillion annually by 2030.
• If Nvidia captures a 36% spending share, its revenue could reach $1.44 trillion, implying a $21.6 trillion valuation.
news.Keywords: AI stock prediction, GPU demand, data center spending, revenue projection, valuation forecast

news.Title: TACO再發威、台股大漲，各類股多頭齊揚
news.Content: 【財訊快報／魏聖峰】在美國總統川普接受巴基斯坦總理的建議暫時接受與伊朗的停火協議，暫停兩週對伊朗的攻擊行動，TACO再度發揮功效，帶動週二美股盤後交易期貨指數大漲、國際油價大跌9%，帶動週三亞洲股市的全面上漲行情。週 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普接受巴基斯坦建議暫停對伊朗攻擊兩週，帶動週三亞洲股市全面上漲。
• 台股在利多加持下，開高走高並攻克34000點關卡，有直逼35000點企圖心。
• 台積電開盤突破1935元，維持高檔震盪，奠定指數大漲空間。
• 台達電、台光電、欣興、奇鋐、致茂股價漲停，是加權指數上漲主力。

news.Title: 去年「187家公司」賺逾1股本！謝金河看好「2產業」
news.Content:
財經中心／李明融報導

美國總統川普（Donald Trump）同意暫停對伊朗進行更激進的軍事行動，停戰時間則為期2週，市場立刻出現談判的曙光，投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）收盤以34761點作收，上漲1531點，寫 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普同意暫停對伊朗更激進軍事行動兩週，市場出現談判曙光，台股9日收盤上漲1531點，台積電漲90元。
• 財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，台灣去年賺超過一個股本的公司高達187家，顯示企業獲利能力強勁。
• 去年全體上市櫃公司淨利4.53兆元創歷史紀錄，台積電貢獻1.7178兆元，佔38%。
• 去年EPS超過100元的有4家，台積電EPS 66.26元排第9，聯發科66.16元排第10。
• 謝金河點名記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，預期全年淨利上看5.99兆元。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,台積電,謝金河,獲利,EPS,記憶體,通路商,AI

• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，預言記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。
• 去年上市櫃公司淨利逐年成長，2025年達4.53兆元，台積電貢獻1.71兆元，佔38%。
• 展望後市，記憶體與通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。

• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，預言記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。
• 去年上市櫃公司淨利逐年成長，2025年達4.53兆元，台積電貢獻1.71兆元，佔38%。
• 展望後市，記憶體與通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,獲利,EPS,謝金河,台積電,記憶體,通路商,AI

news.Title: 2 Reasons I Wouldn't Buy the SpaceX IPO With Free Money
news.Content: SpaceX is getting ready to go public, and it could be the biggest IPO in history. After the company filed confidentially to go public last week, Bloomberg reported that it's seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion, though CEO Elon Musk has pushed back on that report. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion, based on estimates from the board of directors and investment bankers, in February ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion for its IPO.
• The company generated $15 billion-$16 billion in revenue in 2025, with $8 billion in EBITDA.
• Based on a $2 trillion valuation, SpaceX's price-to-sales ratio would be approximately 130.
• This valuation is higher than any S&P 500 stock except Palantir, and more than three times higher than most.
• Elon Musk's leadership carries risk due to overpromising and shifting investor attention.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, valuation risk, price-to-sales, Elon Musk risk, market expectations

news.Title: 台股沒有便宜的股票了！胡采蘋揭迷思：便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字
news.Content:
記者李鴻典／台北報導

你有投資股票嗎？財經網美胡采蘋今（8）天表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字。2020年台灣戰勝疫情之後，台灣就大步走上了強 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經網美胡采蘋表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字，台灣只會越來越值錢。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，破萬後迅速衝破2萬、3萬，今年挑戰4萬。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為，如果還有便宜的股票，是因為大家都漲了，它為什麼沒漲。
• 股價低的股票買了不漲就是貴，股價高的股票一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

news.Title: 量產專案減少，智原Q1估為今年營運谷底
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 11:56:23 黃立安 發佈

ASIC設計服務廠智原(3035)今年第一季營運表現承 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASIC設計服務廠智原今年第一季營運表現承壓，主因量產專案減少，導致單季營收下滑。
• 公司3月營收10.67億元，月增44.72%、年減69.38%；累計第一季營收25.89億元，季減7.8%、年減65%。
• 總經理王國雍坦言，第一季為全年營運谷底。
• 市場關注智原在先進製程合作中的角色與效益，Intel加入Terafab計畫。
• 法人認為，隨著18A平台成熟與生態系擴張，智原可望受惠於先進製程導入門檻提升，強化ASIC設計服務競爭力。

news.Title: 蘋果自研AI晶片Baltra曝光！韓媒：蘋果直接測試玻璃基板 意欲掌控封裝決策權
news.Content: 韓媒《The Elec》周二 (7 日) 報導指出，蘋果正加速自研 AI 硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 韓媒報導，蘋果正加速自研AI硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於代號「Baltra」的AI伺服器晶片。
• Baltra預計採用台積電3奈米N3E製程，並採用chiplet小晶片架構組合。
• 為增強供應鏈掌控，蘋果直接向三星電機評估採購玻璃基板。
• 晶片通信交由博通開發，三星電機負責提供T-glass玻璃基板，最終由台積電生產封裝。
• 蘋果意圖掌控封裝決策權，透過垂直整合策略，逐步內部化關鍵技術。
news.Keywords: 蘋果,AI晶片,Baltra,玻璃基板,台積電,三星電機,博通,封裝,供應鏈,垂直整合

news.Content: 台股今（8）日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，其中「不配息0050」凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張，奪台股及ETF成交量冠軍。
• 009816主打「股息自動再投入」機制，將股利直接再投資於成分股，不採配息方式，吸引長期投資資金。
• 009816追蹤「臺灣TOP 50指數」，前十大持股以電子權值股為主，台積電權重高達42.2%。

• 儘管短期需留意地緣政治與通膨變數，但中長期基本面依然穩健。

news.Title: 187家賺逾1股本！ 謝金河點名「2產業」：獲利會很嚇人
news.Content: 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元。雖然台積電以1.7兆元獲利穩坐護國神山，但數據顯示台灣已非「一個人的武林」，去年高達187家公司賺超過一個股本，從AI供應鏈到觀光旅遊業 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元再創新高，去年EPS突破10元的企業高達187家。
• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，謝金河預言，記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。
• 台積電去年獲利1.7兆元，佔上市櫃公司淨利38%，扮演護國神山角色。
• 謝金河指出，台灣企業獲利能力超強，數字令人驚嘆。
• 預期記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。

news.AI_Summary:
• 信驊3月和第1季自結合併營收同創新高，加上美伊停火協議，帶動台股飆漲逾1300點。

news.Title: 高盛、大摩喊買！ 台積電目標價衝2750元 專家揭「瘋狂上修關鍵」
news.Content: 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。儘管消費性電子疲軟，高盛與大摩仍因AI需求爆發調升其長期營運展望，產業專家沈萬鈞表示，台積電成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。
• 高盛與摩根士丹利因AI需求爆發調升台積電長期營運展望，認為成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與資本支出將迎來結構性上揚。
• 儘管消費性電子疲軟，但AI GPU、AI ASIC及傳統伺服器CPU需求強勁，已迅速填補產能缺口。
• 高盛預期下一代AI加速器將推動製程從N5遷移至N3，並進一步往N2推進，先進製程供給到2027年後仍將維持緊張。
• 高盛將台積電12個月目標價上修至2750元並維持買進評等，摩根士丹利維持「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,毛利率,資本支出,先進製程,高盛,摩根士丹利,目標價,營收,AI加速器

news.Title: 台積電法說會前美系外資調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】趕在台積電(2330)下週召開法說會前，美系外資在最新出爐的報告中調高目標價，由原先預估的2600元調 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電下週召開法說會前，美系外資最新報告調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」評等。
• 另一家美系外資重申「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
• 美系外資看好台積電受惠於人工智慧將帶動多年成長，以及更高的結構性毛利率。
• 預估台積電2026-2027年獲利預估上調約4-6%，主要受惠於AI需求強勁成長及毛利率結構性提高。
• 儘管智慧型手機和消費性電子產品需求疲軟，但AI加速器和AI驅動的伺服器CPU需求強勁，足以抵銷影響。

news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊傳出暫時停火消息，市場避險情緒降溫，國際油價跌破每桶100美元，台股8日盤勢反彈，一度上漲1364點，最高來到34593點。

• 電子股表現最為強勢，因本益比普遍較高，先前恐慌情緒升溫時跌幅較深，市場回穩資金優先回流。
• 金融股因具備較高殖利率保護，近期走勢相對穩定，呈現防禦型資產特性。

財經中心／余國棟報導

受到美股尾盤急拉激勵，加上美國總統川普宣布與伊朗停火兩周，市場風險情緒快速回溫，帶動台股今日開盤呈現跳空大漲格局。台股今（8）日開盤強勢上攻，加權指數大漲1201點至3443 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受到美股尾盤急拉激勵，加上美國總統川普宣布與伊朗停火兩周，市場風險情緒快速回溫，台股今日開盤呈現跳空大漲格局。

• 台積電大漲75元帶動下，電子權值股全面點火，市場情緒明顯轉向樂觀。

• AI相關族群全面爆發，包括記憶體族群大漲6.57%、電子零組件族群全面爆發，台達電大漲8.58%。

news.Title: 大和喊進南亞科「目標價292」 專家直指關鍵：定價模型徹底改變
news.Content: 大和證券近期將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，具多年市場經驗的基金經理人沈萬鈞直指核心關鍵，若獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間的高位，南亞科的定價模型將徹底改變，從傳統循環股轉向戰略資源供應 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 大和證券將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位。
• 南亞科3月合併營收181.70億元，第一季累計營收490.87億元，獲利優於預期。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 北美CSP正與供應商洽談長約，記憶體已成為AI基礎設施中「不能斷料的戰略資源」。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,大和證券,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: The Crowd Is Dumping Iren. Here's Why I'd Be Buying It Down 54%.
news.Content: Not that long ago, Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) enjoyed a monumental bull run, soaring from $5 to $76 in less than a year. That euphoric momentum has been depleted. The stock has crashed by 54% from its all-time high, but the long-term picture is stronger than ever. Here's why Iren looks like a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Iren's stock has crashed 54% from its all-time high, with an at-the-market equity program causing skepticism.
• The company has a $11 billion market cap, and the equity program could dilute shares by half.
• Iren signed a landmark five-year $9.7 billion deal with Microsoft for AI data center capacity.
• The company secured a 1.6 gigawatt site in Oklahoma, boosting its total pipeline to over 4.5 gigawatts.
• Iren entered a purchase agreement for more than 50,000 Nvidia chips, indicating strategic moves.
news.Keywords: stock dilution, AI data center, gigawatt pipeline, Nvidia chip purchase, capital intensive

• The company secured a 1.6 gigawatt site in Oklahoma, boosting its total pipeline to over 4.5 gigawatts.
• Iren entered a purchase agreement for more than 50,000 Nvidia chips, indicating strategic moves.
news.Keywords: stock dilution, AI data center, gigawatt pipeline, Nvidia chip purchase, capital intensive

news.Title: 大場面來了！台股爆噴1208點 估量破兆站上所有均線
news.Content: 美國總統川普發布重訊表示，將對伊朗轟炸暫停2週，受此消息激勵，台股今（8 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 漲幅3.61%，預估成交量1.1兆，櫃買指數則開高震盪，早盤來到337.98點，上漲12.37點，漲幅3.75%。
• 台積電（2330）早盤來到1935元，上漲75元，漲幅4.03%。
• 鴻海（2317）早盤來到198元，上漲6元，漲幅3.12%，聯發科（2454）來到1520元，上漲50元，漲幅3.4%。
• 台達電（2308）則來到1625元，上漲110元，漲幅逾7.26%。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,開盤,漲點,成交量,台積電,鴻海,聯發科,台達電,AI

news.Content:
【統一證券】

技術面觀察，週二台股收盤站上所有均線之 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 統一證券技術面觀察，週二台股收盤站上所有均線之上，然成交量大幅萎縮，創今年以來最低量。
• 目前10日線及月線下彎，技術指標KD、RSI向上、MACD綠色柱狀體縮小，整體技術面為區間震盪格局。
• 後續多空仍須留意中東戰事消息面變化。
• 國票證券認為，大盤大漲逾600點，然成交量反而收斂，顯示市場仍在觀望美伊後續談判進展。
• 只要後續朝延長戰線但不全面升級的方向發展，操作上仍可以季線作為支撐，逐步布局。
news.Keywords: 台股,技術面,成交量,美伊戰事,觀望,區間震盪,季線,月線,AI

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】美以伊同意暫時停火　台股短線多頭反攻34000
news.Content:
日期：2026年 4月 8日

※盤勢分析

美以伊同意暫時停火、油價崩跌，台股短線多頭反攻34000

※昨日盤勢

川普對伊朗於4/8停火協議到期前極限施壓，儘管油價維持上漲，但美股在

清明連假期間出現利空鈍化反彈，激勵台股週二反彈上漲 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 統一證券分析，美以伊同意暫時停火，油價崩跌，台股短線多頭反攻34000點。
• 川普對伊朗施壓，美股出現利空鈍化反彈，激勵台股週二反彈上漲，收盤站上所有均線。
• 晶圓代工成熟製程因中國晶合集成及世界先進調漲價格10%，表現強勢，中小型績優電子族群百花齊放。
• 台積電上漲2.76%，鴻海下跌0.52%，聯發科上漲0.34%，廣達上漲1.58%，台達電上漲5.94%。
• 市場關注美伊後續談判進展，預期台股可望延續上漲，但仍須關注中東消息面變化。

news.Title: 【盤前焦點】美股、台指期夜盤翻紅　台股拚續強
news.Content: （中央社記者江明晏台北2026年04月8日電）對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷莫茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高，國際油價收盤互有漲跌；台指期夜盤震 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷姆茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高。
• 國際油價收盤互有漲跌，台指期夜盤震盪，終場漲318點，台積電期貨盤後也收紅。
• 投顧認為有助台股表現，市場預期美伊協商仍有空間，不至於有供給中斷的極端風險。
• 然而，最終協議達成前，不確定性仍將使油市維持高波動，持續牽動通膨與利率。
• 市場解讀外交有降溫空間，資金向具備AI催化劑的科技龍頭集中，有助台股表現。
news.Keywords: 盤前焦點,美股,台指期,台股,續強,美伊停火,川普,荷姆茲海峽,油價,台積電,AI

news.Title: 1分鐘讀財經》台積電法說倒數 外資曝6大必考題！這次「回檔」成致富跳板
news.Content: 小編今天（8）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 預期台積電基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 台積電2奈米製程推進進度、客戶導入情況及其對獲利與接單動能的挹注，亦是法說會重要觀察指標。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,2奈米,先進製程,封裝,資本支出,營收

news.Title: 創意3月營收月增15%；Q1寫次高/年增達63%
news.AI_Summary:
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15%、年增33%，創同期新高。
• 第一季合併營收114.48億元，季減7.68%、年增63%，創單季歷史次高。
• 公司拿下Google CPU大單，下一代CPU訂單也順利到手，今年CPU產能比去年更多。
• AI晶片進入量產階段帶動出貨快速攀升，量產業務今年有望延續去年強勁成長力道。
• ADAS業務中國、歐洲客戶已開始量產，北美客戶專案也在進行中，對今明兩年展望樂觀。
news.Keywords: 創意,營收,Google,CPU,AI晶片,量產,ADAS,台積電,NRE

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Isn't Over -- It Just Moved. 5 Growth Stocks Riding the Next Wave.
news.Content: Despite the stock market's rotation out of tech stocks this year, the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is far from over. However, it has shifted, which is going to benefit a new basket of AI stocks . The AI infrastructure boom started with the need for raw computing power to train large language models (LLMs). This was a race that helped line the pockets of Nvidia with massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is shifting towards networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Broadcom is a leader in Ethernet switches and data center networking components.
• Broadcom is also a leader in ASIC technology for the inference market.
• Alphabet is partnering with Broadcom on advanced AI ASICs (TPUs), offering a 44% lower total cost of ownership than Nvidia servers.
• Arista Networks provides networking platforms and benefits from growing AI chip clusters.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, networking, inference, ASIC technology, data center infrastructure

news.Title: Apple encounters serious problems with foldable iPhone
news.Content: Apple's long-anticipated entry into the foldable smartphone market has run into trouble before the product ever reached a store shelf. The company has experienced setbacks in the engineering test phase of its first foldable iPhone that could delay mass production and its planned shipment schedule, Nikkei Asia reported on April 6, citing multiple sources briefed on the matter. Reuters, which also carried the story, said it could not independently verify the report. Apple did not respond to TheStreet's request for comment. Apple shares ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's foldable iPhone entry faces engineering test phase setbacks, potentially delaying mass production and shipment.
• Nikkei Asia reported that April is a critical stage for engineering verification, with potential delays extending by months.
• Apple planned to launch 7 to 8 million foldable units, less than 10% of total 2026 iPhone production.
• Engineering challenges include hinge reliability, display durability, and component integration into a thin form factor.
• A delay could impact Apple's marketing strategy and give rivals like Samsung more time to capture market share.
news.Keywords: foldable iPhone, engineering challenges, production delay, supply chain, market competition

news.Title: Nvidia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chips Still Need Memory. Here's Why the Micron Sell-Off Has Gone Too Far.
news.Content: In late March, Alphabet unveiled a new software product called TurboQuant. At a high level, TurboQuant dramatically compresses memory footprints in large language models during inference . It didn't take long for headlines to circulate and cause shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) to plunge. In large part, the sell-off was tied to Micron's relationship with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) since its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions help power Nvidia's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's TurboQuant software compresses memory footprints in large language models, causing a sell-off in memory stocks like Micron.
• Nvidia's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions power its GPUs, making Micron a key supplier.
• The article argues that TurboQuant does not eliminate the need for Micron's memory solutions.
• Nvidia's latest chip architectures (Blackwell, Vera Rubin) are designed with larger HBM stacks.
• Nvidia cannot easily switch suppliers due to extensive testing and integration requirements.
news.Keywords: TurboQuant, memory demand, HBM, GPU integration, supply chain risk

news.Title: 台股下跌你不要怕！法人丟出災難投資法　它把握撿鑽石機會
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

2026年第一季末，台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾後，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔。
• 操作上需嚴防非理性拋售，國泰金控總經理李長庚提出「災難投資法」，認為戰爭持續時可視為進場機會點。
• 主動國泰動能高息ETF（00400A）經理人梁恩溢表示，市場恐慌帶來的股價回檔，對剛握有充足現金的主動式基金而言，是「彎腰撿鑽石」的布局良機。
• 00400A具備「成長攻擊、收益防守」雙主流配置策略，並搭配月配息機制，成分股中的「高息股」可扮演關鍵緩衝角色。
• 建議分批佈局，逢回優先聚焦具備高護城河、高毛利與高現金流的AI業績成長股。
news.Keywords: 台股,地緣政治,油價,美股,科技股,國泰金,災難投資法,00400A,ETF,AI,高息股,護城河

news.Content: ASIC設計服務廠營運表現分歧，創意（3443）、巨有（8227）皆受惠ASIC專案放量，3月營收維持高檔水準；智原（3035）則因量產專案減少，營收較去年同期 ...

• 智原因量產專案減少，營收較去年同期減少近7成，凸顯ASIC產業波動特性。
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15.16％、年增33.48％，創同期最佳；第一季合併營收114.48億元，年增62.99%。
• 創意專注2.5D／3D、CoWoS等技術，與台積電供應鏈優勢，已與美系CSP建立合作關係。
• 法人看好智原在先進製程與高效能運算領域的布局，可望受惠於18A平台成熟與生態系擴張。
news.Keywords: ASIC,創意,智原,巨有,營收,AI,台積電,CoWoS,CSP,先進製程

news.Title: 南亞科Q1獲利唱旺 外資青睞
news.Content: 記憶體一哥南亞科（2408）望到外資春風。大和資本證券指出，隨DRAM報價走揚，南亞科第一季獲利將超越預期，DDR4今年全年需求都極為強勁，將 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 記憶體一哥南亞科（2408）獲外資青睞，大和資本證券上調目標價至292元，維持「買進」評等。
• 認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位，南亞科定價模型將徹底改變，轉向戰略資源供應者。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 南亞科已與包含SanDisk、Solidigm在內多家客戶簽署多年期DRAM長約，合約總額約達25億美元。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,外資,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: 台股強勢登月 重返33K
news.Content: 台股清明連假後首日交易，戰事紛擾暫擺一邊。台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤直接跳空至1,850元大漲40元，終場收在1,850元勁揚50元，權值股台達電等齊助攻，加權指數 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股清明連假後首日交易，台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤跳空至1,850元大漲40元。
• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。
• 凱基投顧、群益投顧認為，台股需觀察美伊停火談判明朗，若能重啟運輸，可避免油價續漲、通膨疑慮。
• 基本面利多齊發，包括去年獲利股息雙創高、台積電法說會可望釋利多、美國科技股財報上修可期。
• 法人對台股中長線看法樂觀，期待見到黑暗後露黎明曙光。
news.Keywords: 台股,台積電,月線,美伊停火,油價,通膨,財報,法說會,AI,籌碼

news.Content: 美國總統川普指美軍預計在2周～3周內撤離伊朗，市場預期戰事即將結束，一度帶動台股ETF飆翻天，截至4月1日收盤績效前十 ...

news.Title: 主動式台股ETF 績效贏大盤
news.Content: 美伊戰事2月底開打，台股3月修正幅度達10.42％，但主動選股策略的主動台股ETF全部跑贏大盤，其中四檔跌幅在3％以內，表現遠勝過大盤，包括主動統一台股增長、主 ...

news.Title: 台股強勢登月 重返33K
news.Content: 台股清明連假後首日交易，戰事紛擾暫擺一邊。台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤直接跳空至1,850元大漲40元，終場收在1,850元勁揚50元，權值股台達電等齊助攻，加權指數 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股清明連假後首日交易，台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤跳空至1,850元大漲40元。
• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。
• 凱基投顧、群益投顧認為，台股需觀察美伊停火談判明朗，若能重啟運輸，可避免油價續漲、通膨疑慮。
• 基本面利多齊發，包括去年獲利股息雙創高、台積電法說會可望釋利多、美國科技股財報上修可期。
• 法人對台股中長線看法樂觀，期待見到黑暗後露黎明曙光。
news.Keywords: 台股,台積電,月線,美伊停火,油價,通膨,財報,法說會,AI,籌碼

news.Title: 權證市場焦點－台積電 急單需求增
news.Content: 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）16日法說會即將召開，市場提前押寶買盤也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日法說會召開，市場提前押寶買盤踴躍，台積電股價7日領軍大漲2.76%，終場收1,860元。
• 法人分析，台積電2奈米製程報價將突破3萬美元，AI需求急迫，訂單能見度至2028年。
• 預估台積電第一季毛利率有望攀升至66.8%，反映N3產能緊張、先進製程利用率高及急單需求增加。
• 預期今年及2027年營收年增幅都將超過3成，N3營收今年成長至2倍，占總體營收30%以上。
• 上修今年及2027年每股稅後純益預估值至95.5元及120.4元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,晶圓代工,2奈米,AI,毛利率,N3,營收,EPS,先進製程

news.Title: 台積法說下周登場 外資揭六大必考題
news.Content: 全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同時，外資亦把握回 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 摩根大通預期台積電法說會基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 摩根士丹利認為，台積電2027、2028年資本支出上看650與700億美元，產能擴張將確保領導地位。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,2奈米,先進製程,封裝,資本支出,營收

news.Title: Why Shares of Car-Rental Outfit Avis Are Driving Higher Today
news.Content: Following through on bullishness that first materialized late last month , shares of Avis Budget Group (NASDAQ: CAR) are up again today. Indeed, thanks to today's 15.7% gain (as of 3:40 p.m. ET), the stock's up 150% from its mid-March low, reaching a new 52-week high in the process. You just can't count on this rally continuing much longer than it already has enough to dive into it now. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Avis Budget Group (CAR) shares are up 150% from their mid-March low, reaching a new 52-week high.
• The stock is considered a short-squeeze candidate, with 23% of outstanding shares and 48% of float sold short.
• Short sellers face widening unrealized losses as the stock gains.
• The situation is largely psychological, with unpredictable outcomes for both short sellers and squeeze proponents.
• The article advises against playing the game due to the unpredictability of short squeezes.
news.Keywords: short squeeze, Avis stock, trading psychology, market volatility, risk management

news.Title: Dimon Says AI Capital Spending Will Hit $725 Billion in 2026. Here Are the Sectors That Will Win and the Ones That Will Be Left Behind
news.Content: The artificial intelligence ( AI ) market has expanded rapidly over the past decade, driven by the arrival of more sophisticated generative AI applications, chatbots, and services. That expansion drove many AI stocks to all-time highs. Still, some of those market darlings fizzled out this year as inflation, geopolitical conflicts, and other macro headwinds pushed investors toward more conservative investments. But over the long term, the AI market ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hyperscalers like Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet will increase annual AI-driven capital spending from $450 billion (2025) to $725 billion (2026).
• The biggest beneficiaries are AI infrastructure stocks, including data center REITs like Equinix and Digital Realty.
• Leading AI chipmakers like Nvidia and Broadcom, and foundries like TSMC, will also profit.
• Companies supplying optical equipment, such as Lumentum and Corning, will benefit from data center connection upgrades.
• Older and smaller software companies like Salesforce and ServiceNow may struggle against newer AI challengers.
news.Keywords: AI capital spending, data center REITs, AI infrastructure, chipmakers, software competition

news.Title: Why Intel Stock Is Gaining Today
news.Content: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) stock is moving higher Tuesday despite bearish pressures for the broader market. The semiconductor company's share price was up 2.2% as of 3:15 p.m. ET. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 had fallen 0.7%, and the Nasdaq Composite was off 1%. The stock had been up as much as 4.9% earlier in the day. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel stock is up 2.2% despite broader market declines, driven by a new partnership with SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI.
• Intel will join Elon Musk's Terafab project to advance chip fabrication for AI and robotics.
• The partnership is a significant win for Intel's turnaround efforts and its manufacturing business.
• Terafab aims to produce advanced chip designs and up to a terawatt of compute power annually.
• The collaboration could be a substantial boost for Intel's foundry services, facing competition from TSMC.
news.Keywords: Intel stock, Terafab project, AI partnership, semiconductor manufacturing, foundry services

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Just Entered Phase 2. Most Investors Aren't Ready.
news.Content: The first phase of the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle was all about chips. It didn't take long for the whole market to catch on when Nvidia became a household name and data center stocks surged to crazy valuations. That trade happened in broad daylight. Phase 2 is quieter. It's happening in server rooms you'll never visit, in underground fiber conduits across rural Illinois, and in the test labs that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is entering Phase 2, focusing on networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Keysight Technologies reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $1.6 billion (up 23% YoY) and record orders of $1.65 billion.
• Wireline revenue surpassed wireless revenue, driven by demand for 800G and 1.6T optical transceiver validation.
• Keysight's full-year revenue growth is guided 'just above 20%', with software and services accounting for 40% of revenue.
• Calix builds an AI cloud and appliance-based platform for rural broadband providers, benefiting from federal BEAD program funding.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle phase 2, optical networking, AI infrastructure, broadband deployment, rural connectivity

news.Title: Why Arm Holdings Stock Skyrocketed 18% in March
news.Content: Shares of Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) bounded higher in March, gaining as much as 18.7%, according to data supplied by S&P Global Market Intelligence . The catalyst that sent the semiconductor specialist higher was the development of Arm's very first in-house production artificial intelligence (AI) chip and the ensuing reaction ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings stock gained 18.7% in March, driven by the development of its first in-house AI chip, the Arm AGI CPU.
• The Arm AGI CPU is designed for AI inference in data centers, offering twice the performance-per-watt of x86 racks.
• CEO Rene Haas estimates Arm could generate $25 billion in annual revenue and $9 EPS by 2031, with $15 billion from the AGI CPU.
• Guggenheim maintained a Buy rating and raised its price target to $240, representing potential 61% upside.
• The stock is trading at 49 times next year's expected sales, but less than 17 times estimated 2031 earnings.
news.Keywords: AI chip development, Arm AGI CPU, performance-per-watt, revenue projection, stock valuation

news.Title: The Big Risk With Taiwan Semiconductor Stock That No One Wants to Talk About
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) plays a crucial role in the tech sector, as it is the go-to chip manufacturer for many companies.
